title: Sour Quick Moroccan Almond Toast
description: A tangy, nutty toast that bursts with Moroccan spices and almond flavor, perfect for a swift breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: maple syrup
ingredients.notes: optional, for a touch of sweetness

instructions: Heat a small skillet over medium heat and add 1 tsp olive oil.
Place the whole-grain bread slices in the skillet, toasting each side until golden and crisp, about 2 minutes per side.

In a small bowl, whisk together 2 tbsp unsweetened almond milk, ½ tsp almond extract, 1 tsp fresh lemon juice, ½ tsp lemon zest, 1 tsp maple syrup, ¼ tsp ground cumin, ¼ tsp ground coriander, ¼ tsp smoked paprika, a pinch of salt, and a pinch of black pepper.
Spread the almond-lemon mixture evenly over the warm toasted bread slices.
Sprinkle chopped fresh parsley over the top and serve immediately.
Optional: drizzle a few drops of extra virgin olive oil over the final garnish for added depth.
